name: Summertime's Bounty Pie
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Sour Cream or Plain Yogurt
recipeInstructions:
Choose one of the following soup mixes to use in the recipe:
Onion, Onion-Mushroom or Beefy Onion.
Preheat oven to 350 degrees F. In a large bowl, combine the onion soup mix, ground beef, bread crumbs, sour cream or yogurt, egg and thyme or basil. Sprinkle flour into a 9-inch pie pan. Press the ground beef mixture onto the bottom and sides of the prepared pan, shaping edges 3/4 inch above the pan and forming a center "well". Bake for 40 minutes. Fill with 3/4 cup cheese, then vegetables and remaining cheese. Bake an additional 10 minutes or until cheese is melted.
Microwave Directions:
In a 9-inch glass pie plate, prepare the ground beef mixture as above. Heat, uncovered at HIGH (Full Power) for 9 minutes, turning the plate every 3 minutes. Fill as above and heat for 3 minutes at HIGH (Full Power). Let stand covered for 5 minutes before serving.
